target_name: Paper 06 (Part 11) — Evidence Sync Endpoint Accepts Payload
context: Paper 06 (Part 11 Evidence): SHA-256 sealed results must be pushable to cloud. POST /api/v1/qa-evidence/sync must accept JSON payload and return {ok:true}. This verifies the HITL chain works end-to-end. Cem Kaner: a seal without a destination is just theater.
